title: 彼女は学生ではありません
jp: 彼女は学生ではありません
en: She is not a student.

title: 昨日は暇だった
jp: 昨日は暇だった
en: Yesterday I was free.

title: 窓を開けてください
jp: 窓を開けてください
en: Please open the window.

title: この水は飲めますか
jp: この水は飲めますか
en: Can you drink this water?

title: 妹は公園で本を読みます
jp: 妹は公園で本を読みます
en: My younger sister reads a book in the park.

title: 学生は駅から学校まで歩きます
jp: 学生は駅から学校まで歩きます
en: The student walks from the station to the school.

title: 朝ご飯を食べて、学校へ行きます
jp: 朝ご飯を食べて、学校へ行きます
en: I eat breakfast and then go to school.

title: 窓が開いています
jp: 窓が開いています
en: The window is open.

title: 先生が薦めた本を読んだ
jp: 先生が薦めた本を読んだ
en: I read the book the teacher recommended.

title: 父が植えた木が大きくなった
jp: 父が植えた木が大きくなった
en: The tree my father planted has grown big.

title: 去年の冬はとても寒かったです
jp: 去年の冬はとても寒かったです
en: Last winter was very cold.

title: 天気が良くて気持ちがいい
jp: 天気が良くて気持ちがいい
en: The weather is nice and it feels good.

title: 本を一冊読みました
jp: 本を一冊読みました
en: I read one book.

title: 父は午後9時に帰ります
jp: 父は午後9時に帰ります
en: My father comes home at 9 p.m.

title: 飛行機は船より速いです
jp: 飛行機は船より速いです
en: Airplanes are faster than ships.

title: 夏より秋のほうが好きです
jp: 夏より秋のほうが好きです
en: I like autumn more than summer.

title: こちらでお待ちください
jp: こちらでお待ちください
en: Please wait here.

title: 係の者がご案内いたします
jp: 係の者がご案内いたします
en: A staff member will show you the way.

title: 彼が書いたとされる手紙が見つか…
jp: 彼が書いたとされる手紙が見つからない限り、この事件は解決しないだろう。
en: Unless the letter that is said to have been written by him turns up, this case probably won't be solved.
code:
import type { AdnominalPart, GodanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PronounPart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, SuruVerb, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 書く = GodanVerb & { stem: "書"; ending: "く" };
type する = SuruVerb<"">;
type 見つかる = GodanVerb & { stem: "見つか"; ending: "る" };
type 解決する = SuruVerb<"解決">;

type 彼が書いたとされる手紙が見つからない限りこの事件は解決しないだろう = Sentence<[
  PronounPart<"彼">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<書く, "Ta">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<する, "Passive">,
  SuffixPart<"る">,
  NounPart<"手紙">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<見つかる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  NounPart<"限り">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdnominalPart<"この">,
  NounPart<"事件">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  VerbPart<解決する, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  SuffixPart<"だろう">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 駅前に新しくできたカフェで働い…
jp: 駅前に新しくできたカフェで働いている友達が薦めてくれた本を、まだ読んでいない。
en: I still haven't read the book that the friend who works at the café that newly opened in front of the station recommended to me.

title: 新人時代は、毎晩のように残業さ…
jp: 新人時代は、毎晩のように残業させられた上に、休日まで取引先の接待に駆り出されて、正直、何度も辞めようかと思わされたものだ。
en: Back when I was a new hire, I was made to work overtime almost every night, and on top of that I was even dragged out to entertain clients on my days off — honestly, I was made to wonder more than once whether I should just quit.
code:
import type { AdverbPart, CopulaPart, CounterPart, IchidanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 残業させられる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "残業させられ"; ending: "る" };
type 駆り出される = IchidanVerb & { stem: "駆り出され"; ending: "る" };
type 辞める = IchidanVerb & { stem: "辞め"; ending: "る" };
type 思わされる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "思わされ"; ending: "る" };

type 新人時代は毎晩のように残業させられた上に休日まで取引先の接待に駆り出されて正直何度も辞めようかと思わされたものだ = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"新人時代">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"毎晩">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"よう">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<残業させられる, "Ta">,
  NounPart<"上">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"休日">,
  ParticlePart<"まで">,
  NounPart<"取引先">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"接待">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<駆り出される, "Te">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"正直">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  CounterPart<"何", "度">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<辞める, "Volitional">,
  ParticlePart<"か">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<思わされる, "Ta">,
  NounPart<"もの">,
  CopulaPart<"Plain">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 部長に無理やり書かされた企画書…
jp: 部長に無理やり書かされた企画書を、今度は課長に一から書き直させられた挙げ句、結局は元の案に戻されて、もう何も言う気になれなかった。
en: After being forced to write a proposal by the department head, this time I was made to rewrite it from scratch by the section chief, only to have it reverted to the original draft in the end — I no longer had the will to say anything.
code:
import type { AdjectivePart, AdverbPart, GodanVerb, IAdjective, IchidanVerb, NounPart, NumeralPart, ParticlePart, PronounPart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 書かされる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "書かされ"; ending: "る" };
type 書き直させられる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "書き直させられ"; ending: "る" };
type 戻される = IchidanVerb & { stem: "戻され"; ending: "る" };
type 言う = GodanVerb & { stem: "言"; ending: "う" };
type なれる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "なれ"; ending: "る" };
type ない = IAdjective & { stem: "な"; ending: "い" };

type 入力文 = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"部長">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  AdverbPart<"無理やり">,
  VerbPart<書かされる, "Ta">,
  NounPart<"企画書">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"今度">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  NounPart<"課長">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  NumeralPart<"一">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,
  VerbPart<書き直させられる, "Ta">,
  NounPart<"挙げ句">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"結局">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  NounPart<"元">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"案">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<戻される, "Te">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"もう">,
  PronounPart<"何">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<言う, "Dictionary">,
  NounPart<"気">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<なれる, "MasuStem">,
  AdjectivePart<ない, "Past">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 帝はいたう悲しび嘆かせ給ひて、…
jp: 帝はいたう悲しび嘆かせ給ひて、夜もすがら涙を流させられけるとなむ、語り伝へたる。
en: The Emperor, grieving and lamenting deeply, is said to have shed tears all night long — so the tale has been handed down.
code:
import type { AdverbPart, GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 悲しぶ = GodanVerb & { stem: "悲し"; ending: "ぶ" };
type 嘆かせる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "嘆かせ"; ending: "る" };
type 流させられる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "流させられ"; ending: "る" };
type 語り伝へる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "語り伝へ"; ending: "る" };

type Result = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"帝">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  AdverbPart<"いたう">,
  VerbPart<悲しぶ, "MasuStem">,
  VerbPart<嘆かせる, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"給ひて">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"夜">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  SuffixPart<"す">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  SuffixPart<"ら">,
  NounPart<"涙">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<流させられる, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"ける">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  SuffixPart<"なむ">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  VerbPart<語り伝へる, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"たる">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 先日ご注文いただきました商品に…
jp: 先日ご注文いただきました商品につきまして、メーカーの都合により納期が遅れておりますため、今しばらくお待ちいただけませんでしょうか。ご迷惑をおかけいたしますが、何卒ご了承賜りますようお願い申し上げます。
en: Regarding the product you ordered the other day, the delivery date has been delayed due to circumstances on the manufacturer's side, so could we ask you to wait a little longer? We apologize for the inconvenience, and we humbly ask for your kind understanding.
code:
import type { AdverbPart, CopulaPart, GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type いただく = GodanVerb & { stem: "いただ"; ending: "く" };
type つく = GodanVerb & { stem: "つ"; ending: "く" };
type よる = GodanVerb & { stem: "よ"; ending: "る" };
type 遅れる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "遅れ"; ending: "る" };
type おる = GodanVerb & { stem: "お"; ending: "る" };
type 待つ = GodanVerb & { stem: "待"; ending: "つ" };
type いただける = IchidanVerb & { stem: "いただけ"; ending: "る" };
type かける = IchidanVerb & { stem: "かけ"; ending: "る" };
type いたす = GodanVerb & { stem: "いた"; ending: "す" };
type 賜る = GodanVerb & { stem: "賜"; ending: "る" };
type 願う = GodanVerb & { stem: "願"; ending: "う" };
type 申し上げる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "申し上げ"; ending: "る" };

type 入力文 = Sentence<[
  AdverbPart<"先日">,
  SuffixPart<"ご">,
  NounPart<"注文">,
  VerbPart<いただく, "MasuPast">,
  NounPart<"商品">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<つく, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"まして">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"メーカー">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"都合">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<よる, "MasuStem">,
  NounPart<"納期">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<遅れる, "Te">,
  VerbPart<おる, "Masu">,
  NounPart<"ため">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"今">,
  AdverbPart<"しばらく">,
  SuffixPart<"お">,
  VerbPart<待つ, "MasuStem">,
  VerbPart<いただける, "Masen">,
  CopulaPart<"Te">,
  SuffixPart<"しょう">,
  ParticlePart<"か">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">,
  SuffixPart<"ご">,
  NounPart<"迷惑">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  SuffixPart<"お">,
  VerbPart<かける, "MasuStem">,
  VerbPart<いたす, "Masu">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"何卒">,
  SuffixPart<"ご">,
  NounPart<"了承">,
  VerbPart<賜る, "Masu">,
  NounPart<"よう">,
  SuffixPart<"お">,
  VerbPart<願う, "MasuStem">,
  VerbPart<申し上げる, "Masu">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 恐れ入りますが、会議室の準備が…
jp: 恐れ入りますが、会議室の準備が整い次第、皆様にはこちらへお移りになっていただきますので、それまで少々お待ちくださいますようお願い申し上げます。
en: Excuse me, but as soon as the meeting room is ready, we will have everyone kindly move over here, so we ask that you please wait a moment until then.
code:
import type { GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, AdverbPart, NounPart, ParticlePart, PronounPart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 恐れ入る = GodanVerb & { stem: "恐れ入"; ending: "る" };
type 整う = GodanVerb & { stem: "整"; ending: "う" };
type 移る = GodanVerb & { stem: "移"; ending: "る" };
type なる = GodanVerb & { stem: "な"; ending: "る" };
type いただく = GodanVerb & { stem: "いただ"; ending: "く" };
type 待つ = GodanVerb & { stem: "待"; ending: "つ" };
type くださる = GodanVerb & { stem: "くださ"; ending: "る" };
type 申し上げる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "申し上げ"; ending: "る" };

type 丁寧な会議室案内 = Sentence<[
  VerbPart<恐れ入る, "Masu">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"会議室">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"準備">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<整う, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"次第">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"皆様">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PronounPart<"こちら">,
  ParticlePart<"へ">,
  SuffixPart<"お">,
  VerbPart<移る, "MasuStem">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<なる, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いただく, "Masu">,
  ParticlePart<"ので">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  PronounPart<"それ">,
  ParticlePart<"まで">,
  AdverbPart<"少々">,
  SuffixPart<"お">,
  VerbPart<待つ, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"くださいます">,
  NounPart<"よう">,
  NounPart<"お願い">,
  VerbPart<申し上げる, "Masu">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 勝手なお願いとは存じますが、当…
jp: 勝手なお願いとは存じますが、当日は私どもの社長も同席させていただきたく、もし差し支えなければ、お席を一つご用意いただけますと幸いに存じます。
en: I am aware this is a presumptuous request, but on the day we would like to have our company president attend as well, so if it is not inconvenient, we would be grateful if you could prepare one seat for us.
code:
import type { GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, NaAdjective, Sentence, AdjectivePart, NounPart, PronounPart, CounterPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, SuffixPart, VerbPart, AdverbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 勝手 = NaAdjective & { stem: "勝手" };
type 幸い = NaAdjective & { stem: "幸い" };
type 存じる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "存じ"; ending: "る" };
type 同席させる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "同席させ"; ending: "る" };
type いただく = GodanVerb & { stem: "いただ"; ending: "く" };

type 丁寧な同席依頼 = Sentence<[
  AdjectivePart<勝手, "Basic">,
  NounPart<"お願い">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  VerbPart<存じる, "Masu">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"当日">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PronounPart<"私ども">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"社長">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<同席させる, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いただく, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"たく">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"もし">,
  NounPart<"差し支え">,
  SuffixPart<"なけ">,
  ParticlePart<"れば">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"お席">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  CounterPart<"一", "つ">,
  NounPart<"ご用意">,
  VerbPart<いただく, "PotentialMasu">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  AdjectivePart<幸い, "Adverbial">,
  VerbPart<存じる, "Masu">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 彼が本当のことを言っているかど…
jp: 彼が本当のことを言っているかどうかは、会ってみないと分からないと思う。
en: I think you can't tell whether he's telling the truth or not until you actually meet him.
code:
import type { GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, Sentence, PronounPart, NounPart, AdverbPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, VerbPart, SuffixPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 言う = GodanVerb & { stem: "言"; ending: "う" };
type いる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "る" };
type 会う = GodanVerb & { stem: "会"; ending: "う" };
type みる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "み"; ending: "る" };
type 分かる = GodanVerb & { stem: "分か"; ending: "る" };
type 思う = GodanVerb & { stem: "思"; ending: "う" };

type 彼が本当のことを言っているかどうかは会ってみないと分からないと思う = Sentence<[
  PronounPart<"彼">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  NounPart<"本当">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"こと">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<言う, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いる, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"か">,
  AdverbPart<"どう">,
  ParticlePart<"か">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  VerbPart<会う, "Te">,
  VerbPart<みる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<分かる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<思う, "Dictionary">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 来月から残業代が出なくなるとい…
jp: 来月から残業代が出なくなるというのは、要するに給料が減るということだ。
en: The fact that we'll stop getting paid for overtime starting next month basically means that our salary is going down.
code:
import type { CopulaPart, GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, SuruVerb, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 出る = IchidanVerb & { stem: "出"; ending: "る" };
type なる = GodanVerb & { stem: "な"; ending: "る" };
type いう = GodanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "う" };
type 減る = GodanVerb & { stem: "減"; ending: "る" };
type 要する = SuruVerb<"要">;

type TypedSentence = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"来月">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,
  NounPart<"残業代">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<出る, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"なく">,
  VerbPart<なる, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<いう, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  VerbPart<要する, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  NounPart<"給料">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<減る, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<いう, "Dictionary">,
  NounPart<"こと">,
  CopulaPart<"Plain">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 頼まれてもいないのに、彼女は資…
jp: 頼まれてもいないのに、彼女は資料を全部コピーしておいてくれていたらしい。
en: Apparently she had gone and copied all the materials for me in advance, even though no one had asked her to.
code:
import type { GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, SuruVerb, Sentence, VerbPart, NounPart, PronounPart, AdverbPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, SuffixPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 頼まれる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "頼まれ"; ending: "る" };
type いる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "る" };
type おく = GodanVerb & { stem: "お"; ending: "く" };
type くれる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "くれ"; ending: "る" };

type 頼まれてもいないのに彼女は資料を全部コピーしておいてくれていたらしい = Sentence<[
  VerbPart<頼まれる, "Te">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<いる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  ParticlePart<"のに">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  PronounPart<"彼女">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  NounPart<"資料">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  AdverbPart<"全部">,
  VerbPart<SuruVerb<"コピー">, "Te">,
  VerbPart<おく, "Te">,
  VerbPart<くれる, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いる, "Ta">,
  SuffixPart<"らしい">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 息子は来月から一人暮らしを始め…
jp: 息子は来月から一人暮らしを始めるそうで、家具も少しずつ買い揃えていくことにしたみたいだ。
en: My son says he's starting to live on his own next month, and it seems he's decided to gradually buy and assemble the furniture, bit by bit.
code:
import type { GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, IrregularVerb, Sentence, VerbPart, NounPart, AdverbPart, ParticlePart, CopulaPart, SuffixPart, PunctuationPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 始める = IchidanVerb & { stem: "始め"; ending: "る" };
type 買い揃える = IchidanVerb & { stem: "買い揃え"; ending: "る" };
type いく = GodanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "く" };
type する = IrregularVerb & { dictionary: "する" };

type 息子は来月から一人暮らしを始めるそうで家具も少しずつ買い揃えていくことにしたみたいだ = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"息子">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  NounPart<"来月">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,
  NounPart<"一人暮らし">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<始める, "Dictionary">,
  SuffixPart<"そう">,
  CopulaPart<"Te">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"家具">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  AdverbPart<"少し">,
  SuffixPart<"ずつ">,
  VerbPart<買い揃える, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いく, "Dictionary">,
  NounPart<"こと">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<する, "Ta">,
  SuffixPart<"みたい">,
  CopulaPart<"Plain">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 彼はわざわざ遠くから様子を見に…
jp: 彼はわざわざ遠くから様子を見に来てくれて、励ましの言葉までかけていってくれた。
en: He went out of his way to come all the way from far off to check on me, and even left me with words of encouragement before he went.

title: 調べれば調べるほど分からなくな…
jp: 調べれば調べるほど分からなくなるというのは、知識が足りないからではなく、むしろ知りすぎているからなのかもしれない。
en: The fact that the more you look into it the less you understand may be not because you lack knowledge, but rather because you know too much.
code:
import type { GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, IAdjective, NaAdjective, Sentence, VerbPart, AdjectivePart, NounPart, ParticlePart, AdverbPart, CopulaPart, SuffixPart, PunctuationPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 調べる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "調べ"; ending: "る" };
type 分かる = GodanVerb & { stem: "分か"; ending: "る" };
type ない = IAdjective & { stem: "な"; ending: "い" };
type なる = GodanVerb & { stem: "な"; ending: "る" };
type いう = GodanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "う" };
type 足りる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "足り"; ending: "る" };
type 知る = GodanVerb & { stem: "知"; ending: "る" };
type すぎる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "すぎ"; ending: "る" };
type いる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "る" };
type しれる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "しれ"; ending: "る" };
type なの = NaAdjective & { stem: "な" };

type 調べれば調べるほど分からなくなるというのは知識が足りないからではなくむしろ知りすぎているからなのかもしれない = Sentence<[
  VerbPart<調べる, "Hypothetical">,
  SuffixPart<"ば">,
  VerbPart<調べる, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"ほど">,
  VerbPart<分かる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"なく">,
  VerbPart<なる, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<いう, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"知識">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<足りる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,
  CopulaPart<"Te">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  AdjectivePart<ない, "Adverbial">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"むしろ">,
  VerbPart<知る, "MasuStem">,
  VerbPart<すぎる, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いる, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,
  SuffixPart<"な">,

  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<しれる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: たとえ全員が反対したとしても、…
jp: たとえ全員が反対したとしても、やらなければならないことはやらなければならないし、やってもやらなくても結果が変わらないのなら、せめて後悔しないほうを選ぶ。
en: Even if everyone were to object, what must be done must be done; and if the outcome won't change whether you do it or not, then at least I'll choose the option I won't regret.
code:
import type { AdverbPart, GodanVerb, IrregularVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, SuruVerb, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type する = IrregularVerb & { dictionary: "する" };
type 反対する = SuruVerb<"反対">;
type やる = GodanVerb & { stem: "や"; ending: "る" };
type なる = GodanVerb & { stem: "な"; ending: "る" };
type 変わる = GodanVerb & { stem: "変わ"; ending: "る" };
type 後悔する = SuruVerb<"後悔">;
type 選ぶ = GodanVerb & { stem: "選"; ending: "ぶ" };

type 文 = Sentence<[
  AdverbPart<"たとえ">,
  NounPart<"全員">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<反対する, "Ta">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<する, "Te">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  VerbPart<やる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"なけ">,
  ParticlePart<"れば">,
  VerbPart<なる, "Nai">,

  NounPart<"こと">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  VerbPart<やる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"なけ">,

  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<やる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"なくて">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  NounPart<"結果">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<変わる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  ParticlePart<"なら">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"せめて">,
  VerbPart<後悔する, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  NounPart<"ほう">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<選ぶ, "Dictionary">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: もし君があの便に乗っていなかっ…
jp: もし君があの便に乗っていなかったら、僕たちは今ごろ出会ってもいなかったはずだと思うと、遅れた電車にすら感謝したくなる。
en: When I think that if you hadn't been on that flight, by now we wouldn't even have met, I find myself wanting to be grateful to that very train that ran late.
code:
import type { AdnominalPart, AdverbPart, CopulaPart, GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PronounPart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, SuruVerb, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 乗る = GodanVerb & { stem: "乗"; ending: "る" };
type いる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "る" };
type 出会う = GodanVerb & { stem: "出会"; ending: "う" };
type 思う = GodanVerb & { stem: "思"; ending: "う" };
type 遅れる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "遅れ"; ending: "る" };
type 感謝する = SuruVerb<"感謝">;
type なる = GodanVerb & { stem: "な"; ending: "る" };

type 入力文 = Sentence<[
  AdverbPart<"もし">,
  PronounPart<"君">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  AdnominalPart<"あの">,
  NounPart<"便">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<乗る, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いる, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"なかっ">,
  ParticlePart<"たら">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  PronounPart<"僕">,
  SuffixPart<"たち">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  AdverbPart<"今ごろ">,
  VerbPart<出会う, "Te">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<いる, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"なかった">,
  NounPart<"はず">,
  CopulaPart<"Plain">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<思う, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  VerbPart<遅れる, "Ta">,
  NounPart<"電車">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  SuffixPart<"すら">,
  VerbPart<感謝する, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"たく">,
  VerbPart<なる, "Dictionary">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 課長は、来週までに資料をまとめ…
jp: 課長は、来週までに資料をまとめておくようにと部下に言ったそうだが、本人はそんなことは頼んでいないと言い張っているらしい。
en: I hear the section chief told his subordinate to have the materials put together by next week, but apparently the man himself insists he asked for no such thing.
code:
import type { GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, IAdjective, AdjectivePart, AdnominalPart, CopulaPart, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type まとめる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "まとめ"; ending: "る" };
type おく = GodanVerb & { stem: "お"; ending: "く" };
type 言う = GodanVerb & { stem: "言"; ending: "う" };
type 頼む = GodanVerb & { stem: "頼"; ending: "む" };
type いる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "る" };
type 言い張る = GodanVerb & { stem: "言い張"; ending: "る" };
type らしい = IAdjective & { stem: "らし"; ending: "い" };

type 課長は来週までに資料をまとめておくようにと部下に言ったそうだが本人はそんなことは頼んでいないと言い張っているらしい = Sentence<[

  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,

  NounPart<"こと">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  VerbPart<頼む, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<言い張る, "Te">,

title: 天気予報では明日は一日中晴れる…
jp: 天気予報では明日は一日中晴れると言っていたはずなのに、出かける頃には雨が降り出しそうな空模様で、傘を持っていくべきか迷っている。
en: The forecast was supposed to have said it would be clear all day tomorrow, yet by the time I head out the sky looks like it is about to start raining, and I am torn over whether I should take an umbrella.
code:
import type { CopulaPart, CounterPart, GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 晴れる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "晴れ"; ending: "る" };
type 言う = GodanVerb & { stem: "言"; ending: "う" };
type いる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "る" };
type 出かける = IchidanVerb & { stem: "出かけ"; ending: "る" };
type 降り出す = GodanVerb & { stem: "降り出"; ending: "す" };
type 持つ = GodanVerb & { stem: "持"; ending: "つ" };
type いく = GodanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "く" };
type 迷う = GodanVerb & { stem: "迷"; ending: "う" };

type TypedSentence = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"天気予報">,
  ParticlePart<"で">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  NounPart<"明日">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,

  SuffixPart<"中">,

  PunctuationPart<"、">,

  NounPart<"頃">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,

  SuffixPart<"そうな">,
  NounPart<"空模様">,
  CopulaPart<"Te">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"傘">,

  VerbPart<いる, "Dictionary">,

title: 祖母は若い頃、戦争さえなければ…
jp: 祖母は若い頃、戦争さえなければ女学校の先生になっていたかもしれないと、遠くを見るような目でよく語っていたと母から聞いた。
en: I heard from my mother that my grandmother, in her youth, used to often say — with eyes that seemed to gaze into the distance — that if only there had been no war, she might have become a girls'-school teacher.
code:
import type { GodanVerb, IAdjective, IchidanVerb, Sentence, AdjectivePart, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 若い = IAdjective & { stem: "若"; ending: "い" };
type 遠い = IAdjective & { stem: "遠"; ending: "い" };
type いい = IAdjective & { stem: "い"; ending: "い"; irregular: true };
type なる = GodanVerb & { stem: "な"; ending: "る" };
type いる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "る" };
type 見る = IchidanVerb & { stem: "見"; ending: "る" };
type 語る = GodanVerb & { stem: "語"; ending: "る" };
type 聞く = GodanVerb & { stem: "聞"; ending: "く" };

type 祖母は若い頃戦争さえなければ女学校の先生になっていたかもしれないと遠くを見るような目でよく語っていたと母から聞いた = Sentence<[

title: 値段が高かったので一度は諦めた…
jp: 値段が高かったので一度は諦めたんですが、店員さんがあんまり熱心に勧めてくるものだから、つい買ってしまいました。
en: Since it was expensive I gave up on it once, but the shop clerk kept recommending it so enthusiastically that I ended up buying it after all.
code:
import type { GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, IAdjective, NaAdjective, IrregularVerb, AdjectivePart, AdverbPart, CopulaPart, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 高い = IAdjective & { stem: "高"; ending: "い" };
type 熱心 = NaAdjective & { stem: "熱心" };
type 諦める = IchidanVerb & { stem: "諦め"; ending: "る" };
type 勧める = IchidanVerb & { stem: "勧め"; ending: "る" };
type くる = IrregularVerb & { dictionary: "くる" };
type 買う = GodanVerb & { stem: "買"; ending: "う" };
type しまう = GodanVerb & { stem: "しま"; ending: "う" };

type 値段が高かったので一度は諦めたんですが店員さんがあんまり熱心に勧めてくるものだからつい買ってしまいました = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"値段">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  AdjectivePart<高い, "Past">,
  ParticlePart<"ので">,
  NounPart<"一度">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,

  CopulaPart<"Plain">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,

  AdverbPart<"つい">,
  VerbPart<買う, "Te">,
  VerbPart<しまう, "MasuPast">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 雨が降っても降らなくても遠足は…
jp: 雨が降っても降らなくても遠足は予定通り行うと連絡が来ていたので、子どもたちは前の晩から興奮して、なかなか寝つけなかったらしい。
en: We'd been told the excursion would go ahead as scheduled whether or not it rained, so the kids apparently got so excited from the night before that they could hardly fall asleep.
code:
import type { AdjectivePart, AdverbPart, GodanVerb, IAdjective, IchidanVerb, IrregularVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, SuruVerb, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 降る = GodanVerb & { stem: "降"; ending: "る" };
type 行う = GodanVerb & { stem: "行"; ending: "う" };
type 来る = IrregularVerb & { dictionary: "来る" };
type いる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "る" };
type 興奮する = SuruVerb<"興奮">;
type 寝つける = IchidanVerb & { stem: "寝つけ"; ending: "る" };
type らしい = IAdjective & { stem: "らし"; ending: "い" };

type 入力文 = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"雨">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<降る, "Te">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<降る, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"なくて">,

title: せっかく早起きして作ったお弁当…
jp: せっかく早起きして作ったお弁当を、家に忘れて出てきてしまったが、おかげで久しぶりに同僚と外で昼ご飯を食べられて、それはそれで悪くなかった。
en: I went to the trouble of getting up early to make a bento, but I left it at home when I went out, though thanks to that I got to have lunch outside with a colleague for the first time in a while, which wasn't so bad in its own way.
code:
import type {
  AdjectivePart,
  AdverbPart,
  GodanVerb,
  IchidanVerb,
  IrregularVerb,
  IAdjective,
  NaAdjective,
  NounPart,
  ParticlePart,
  PronounPart,
  PunctuationPart,
  Sentence,
  SuruVerb,
  VerbPart
} from "typed-japanese";

type 早起きする = SuruVerb<"早起き">;
type 作る = GodanVerb & { stem: "作"; ending: "る" };
type 忘れる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "忘れ"; ending: "る" };
type 出る = IchidanVerb & { stem: "出"; ending: "る" };
type くる = IrregularVerb & { dictionary: "くる" };
type しまう = GodanVerb & { stem: "しま"; ending: "う" };
type 食べられる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "食べられ"; ending: "る" };
type 久しぶり = NaAdjective & { stem: "久しぶり" };
type 悪い = IAdjective & { stem: "悪"; ending: "い" };
type ない = IAdjective & { stem: "な"; ending: "い" };

type TypedSentence = Sentence<[
  AdverbPart<"せっかく">,
  VerbPart<早起きする, "Te">,
  VerbPart<作る, "Ta">,
  NounPart<"お弁当">,

title: 立入禁止区域につき、関係者以外…
jp: 立入禁止区域につき、関係者以外の者は、いかなる理由があろうとも、この門より先に立ち入るべからず。
en: As this is a restricted area, persons other than authorized personnel must not, for any reason whatsoever, pass beyond this gate.
code:
import type { AdnominalPart, GodanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type ある = GodanVerb & { stem: "あ"; ending: "る" };
type 立ち入る = GodanVerb & { stem: "立ち入"; ending: "る" };

type 立入禁止区域につき関係者以外の者はいかなる理由があろうともこの門より先に立ち入るべからず = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"立入禁止区域">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  SuffixPart<"つき">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"関係者">,
  NounPart<"以外">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"者">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdnominalPart<"いかなる">,
  NounPart<"理由">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<ある, "Volitional">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdnominalPart<"この">,
  NounPart<"門">,
  ParticlePart<"より">,
  NounPart<"先">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<立ち入る, "Dictionary">,
  SuffixPart<"べ">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,
  SuffixPart<"ず">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 古来、武士たる者、主君を裏切る…
jp: 古来、武士たる者、主君を裏切るがごとき振る舞いは断じて許すまじきものとされてきた。
en: Since ancient times, conduct such as a samurai betraying his lord has been regarded as something that must by no means be permitted.
code:
import type { AdverbPart, GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, IrregularVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 裏切る = GodanVerb & { stem: "裏切"; ending: "る" };
type 許す = GodanVerb & { stem: "許"; ending: "す" };
type される = IchidanVerb & { stem: "され"; ending: "る" };
type くる = IrregularVerb & { dictionary: "くる" };

type 古来武士たる者主君を裏切るがごとき振る舞いは断じて許すまじきものとされてきた = Sentence<[
  AdverbPart<"古来">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"武士">,
  SuffixPart<"たる">,
  NounPart<"者">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"主君">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<裏切る, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  SuffixPart<"ご">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  SuffixPart<"き">,
  NounPart<"振る舞い">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  AdverbPart<"断じて">,
  VerbPart<許す, "Dictionary">,
  SuffixPart<"まじき">,
  NounPart<"もの">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<される, "Te">,
  VerbPart<くる, "Ta">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 返済の期日を過ぎてなお一円も支…
jp: 返済の期日を過ぎてなお一円も支払われぬとあらば、契約に定むるところに従い、しかるべき法的措置を取らざるを得ない。
en: If, even after the repayment deadline has passed, not a single yen has been paid, then in accordance with what the contract stipulates, we shall have no choice but to take appropriate legal measures.
code:
import type { AdverbPart, CounterPart, GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 過ぎる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "過ぎ"; ending: "る" };
type 支払われる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "支払われ"; ending: "る" };
type ある = GodanVerb & { stem: "あ"; ending: "る" };
type 定む = GodanVerb & { stem: "定"; ending: "む" };
type 従う = GodanVerb & { stem: "従"; ending: "う" };
type しかる = GodanVerb & { stem: "しか"; ending: "る" };
type 取る = GodanVerb & { stem: "取"; ending: "る" };
type 得る = IchidanVerb & { stem: "得"; ending: "る" };

type 入力文 = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"返済">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"期日">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<過ぎる, "Te">,
  AdverbPart<"なお">,
  CounterPart<"一", "円">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<支払われる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ぬ">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<ある, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ば">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"契約">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<定む, "Dictionary">,
  SuffixPart<"る">,
  NounPart<"ところ">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<従う, "MasuStem">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  VerbPart<しかる, "Dictionary">,
  SuffixPart<"べき">,
  NounPart<"法">,
  SuffixPart<"的">,
  NounPart<"措置">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<取る, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ざる">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<得る, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;
